{{Quote|I am appalled that the Senate is selectively ignoring its own laws. Mettez Roi has contributed to the election funds of nearly a hundred senators. A civilized man like Palpatine will not let this go unchecked for long.|Han Olbeg|<ref name="HNN53">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|53|sports/13425_1.html|Proposed Galaxy Gladiator Federation Falling Apart}}</ref>}}
[[Senator/Legends|Senator]] '''Han Olbeg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who represented the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pitann]] and the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Following the [[Declaration of a New Order]], Han served in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] under the rule of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].

{{Char-stub}}
